prompt: A young woman shopping in a modern grocery store produce section, holding a green apple near her face and smiling softly at the camera. She has straight, shoulder-length black hair and a natural, fresh look. She is wearing a fitted sleeveless olive-green top and high-waisted cream-colored pants. She stands beside a shopping cart partially filled with fruits and packaged snacks. The background shows neatly arranged colorful fruits on shelves, including apples, oranges, and pears, with bright, even supermarket lighting. The environment is clean, contemporary, and well-organized, with other shoppers slightly blurred in the background. The perspective is eye-level, with a shallow depth of field emphasizing the subject.
